mapper.select: select id, file_name, file_path, file_hash, category, status, remark, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at from kb_document where file_path = #{filePath} limit 1
select id, file_name, file_path, file_hash, category, status, remark, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at from kb_document where file_hash = #{fileHash} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into kb_document ( file_name, file_path, file_hash, category, status, remark, last_sync_at ) values ( #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileHash}, #{category}, #{status}, #{remark}, now() )
mapper.update: update kb_document set file_hash = #{fileHash}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update kb_document set status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, last_sync_at = now(), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update kb_document set status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
